nws_forecast.name: This Afternoon
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely before 5pm, then snow likely. Cloudy. High near 52, with temperatures falling to around 35 in the afternoon. Northwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Snow then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Northwest wind 12 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 39. Southwest wind 7 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Snow then Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow between 7pm and 9pm, then a chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 36. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.
